notable_excerpts: We plan to set up our own green solar and wind power plants, which should come up in the next 18 months to two years.
We have already invested for the acquisition of RE assets worth INR 5,000 crore.
We are also taking steps to convert some of those onshore rigs to dual fuel, that is gas as well as HSD.
We have also started our chopper operations from Surat, which takes care of the transfer of manpower from Surat towards the northern end of these fields.
We are targeting that we should have a reduction of about INR 5,000 crore in OpEx.
The financial results have already been released on November 10, 2025 through a press note and sent to the stock exchanges.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, focusing on renewable energy investments and energy efficiency. Social aspects are less detailed, with some focus on employee logistics. Governance is moderately covered, emphasizing cost optimization and financial transparency.
strengths: Strong commitment to renewable energy projects.
weaknesses: Lack of specific governance practices beyond financial transparency.
